tool_purpose: Transformer text-to-speech model from fairseq S^2. French, single-speaker male voice. Pre-trained on Common Voice v7, fine-tuned on CSS10. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/tts_transformer-fr-cv7_css10').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
